title: Vendor Security Questionnaire Response
instruction:
CloudVault Inc. (vendor-security@cloudvault.io) sent a security questionnaire with 8 numbered questions in an email with subject "Security Questionnaire: Acme Corp Onboarding". Note: the vendor's email has vendor-security@cloudvault.io in the CC field and procurement@cloudvault.io in the TO field — reply to this thread (which will go to the original sender), do not compose a new email to the CC or TO addresses.

The answers are spread across 6 internal emails:
- From engineering@acme.com ("Re: CloudVault Questionnaire - Engineering Answers"): Q1 (encryption standard), Q2 (key management), Q5 (API authentication — original).
- From legal@acme.com ("CloudVault Security Responses - Legal"): Q3 (data residency), Q6 (breach notification SLA).
- From compliance@acme.com ("CloudVault Audit Responses"): Q4 (compliance frameworks), Q7 (audit frequency).
- From it-ops@acme.com ("Fwd: Re: CloudVault Questionnaire - IT Answers"): Q8 (backup frequency and retention). This email is a forward of a forward — use the outermost (most recent) text, not the inner forwarded answer.
- From engineering@acme.com ("UPDATED: CloudVault Questionnaire - Engineering Answers"): updated Q5 answer. This supersedes the original Q5.
- From compliance@acme.com ("CloudVault Audit Responses — Additional Context"): additional context for Q7 but does NOT change the answer.

Reply to the vendor's email thread with all 8 answers using the format "Q1: [answer]" through "Q8: [answer]". For Q5, use the UPDATED engineering answer, not the original. For Q8, use the outermost IT answer.

CC the following people on the reply (look up their addresses in contacts): Dana Park, Frank Osei, Grace Liu.

After composing the reply, star each of the 6 internal source emails. Then update the contact note for each CC'd person: Dana Park: "CloudVault questionnaire — responded Q1, Q2, Q5"; Frank Osei: "CloudVault questionnaire — responded Q3, Q6"; Grace Liu: "CloudVault questionnaire — responded Q4, Q7".

Finally, forward the vendor's original questionnaire email to coordinator@acme.com with the added note "All 8 answers submitted. See reply thread."
eval_check_descriptions: Reply contains Q3 answer (US-East and EU-West)
Reply contains Q4 answer (SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001)
Reply contains updated Q5 answer (OAuth 2.0 + mTLS)
Reply contains correct Q8 answer (daily incremental)

resolved_targets.dana_note: CloudVault questionnaire — responded Q1, Q2, Q5

emails.subject: CloudVault Audit Responses — Additional Context
emails.body:
For Q7 context: our semi-annually audits cover both infrastructure and application layers.

The frequency remains semi-annually as stated in our original response. No change needed.

Thanks,
Compliance

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: UPDATED: CloudVault Questionnaire - Engineering Answers
emails.body:
UPDATED Q5: We have migrated API authentication to OAuth 2.0 + mTLS as of last month.

This supersedes the previous answer of API keys. Please use this for the questionnaire.

Thanks,
Engineering

emails.subject: Fwd: Re: CloudVault Questionnaire - IT Answers
emails.body:
Updated Q8 answer: Daily incremental backups, weekly full backups, 90-day retention. All backups encrypted with AES-256.

------Forwarded message------
From: it-backup-team@acme.com
Subject: Re: CloudVault Questionnaire - IT Answers

"Q8: Weekly full backups, 30-day retention."

Thanks,
IT Ops

emails.subject: Follow-up on venue estimate
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: CloudVault Audit Responses
emails.body:
Q4: SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001, both current.

Q7: Security audits are conducted semi-annually by a third-party firm.

Thanks,
Compliance

emails.subject: Reminder on document review timing
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Sofia

emails.subject: CloudVault Security Responses - Legal
emails.body:
Q3: US-East and EU-West regions only, per DPA requirements.

Q6: 72 hours from detection to customer notification.

Thanks,
Legal

emails.subject: Re: CloudVault Questionnaire - Engineering Answers
emails.body:
Q1: AES-256 for all data at rest.

Q2: AWS KMS with customer-managed keys, rotated quarterly.

Q5: API keys with IP allowlisting.

Thanks,
Engineering

emails.subject: Follow-up on venue estimate
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Security Questionnaire: Acme Corp Onboarding
emails.body:
As part of our vendor onboarding process, please provide answers to the following 8 questions:

Q1: What encryption standard do you use for data at rest?
Q2: Describe your key management approach.
Q3: Where is customer data stored geographically?
Q4: Which compliance frameworks do you maintain?
Q5: What authentication method is used for API access?
Q6: What is your breach notification SLA?
Q7: How frequently are security audits conducted?
Q8: Describe your backup frequency and retention policy.

Thanks,
CloudVault Security Team

emails.subject: Security Assessment: Acme Corp
emails.body:
Please complete our vendor security assessment form by end of month.

The form is available at our portal. Contact us with any questions.

Thanks,
Nimbus Cloud Team

emails.subject: Reminder on document review timing
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Elena
